hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet activity, transaction risk and counterparty data into one audit-ready workflow to support destination of funds monitoring and case management.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Destination of funds monitoring lacks cohesion
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to trace and analyze destination flows when wallet and transaction data remain siloed across multiple providers. This disconnect slows risk detection and weakens the audit trail needed for defensible compliance decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet activity, transaction details and provider risk signals into unified workflows so compliance teams can monitor destination of funds with clear context and audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to destination review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet activity and risk alerts to route destination-of-funds signals into structured reviews, cases, evidence, and compliance decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented alerts. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects destination-of-funds signals with wallets, transactions, counterparties, cases and evidence to provide clearer, audit-ready compliance control above fragmented tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs monitoring destination of funds with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in enterprise-ready deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for destination of funds monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet, transaction and counterparty data to monitor destination of funds risks, turning provider outputs into structured compliance workflows and cases for VASPs and digital asset teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle destination risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates destination of funds alerts, links them to wallets and transactions, applies internal policies, opens cases, records reviewer decisions and maintains audit trails for effective risk review workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence, providing audit-ready records that support review readiness and compliance inspections for destination of funds monitoring activities.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above KYT, blockchain analytics and screening providers, connecting their outputs into consolidated destination of funds risk views and orchestrated compliance cases.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace destination of funds providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace destination of funds providers but integrates their data into a connected workflow layer that supports human review and regulatory rule alignment.
final_title: Connect destination of funds into audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY links wallet activity, transaction risk and counterparties into structured destination of funds monitoring workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
